Posting Schedule

WeekPhaseMondayWednesdayFridayBest Times
Week 1TeasePost 1 — The Glow Is ComingPost 2 — Enter the GlowPost 3 — Won't Sleep Through This8–9am PST
or
6–8pm PST
Week 2Tease ContinuesPost 4 — Your Stay Looks DifferentPost 5 — Design FirstPost 6 — Three Colors
Week 3RevealPost 7 — Logo RevealPost 8 — No Front DeskPost 9 — Book Direct
Week 4ExperiencePost 10 — POV Check InPost 11 — Every DetailPost 12 — Grand Opening

Notes

  • All posts designed in Canva using files from the Brand Assets folder.
  • Hashtag block goes at end of caption — not in the body text.
  • Schedule through Blotato once Evan approves the batch.
  • Posts 9 and 12 require the live direct booking URL confirmed before scheduling.
  • No hotel room photos yet — Posts 1–12 use design-only visuals. Swap in real property photos for Posts 10 and 11 once available.
  • Do not use "Balboa Park Hotel" anywhere — old name fully phased out.
  • Do not add direct URLs in Airbnb listing text — Post 9 URL is for Instagram bio only.
